original: a lucinite ball stud piercing decorated with tiny pieces of savicite

original: A beautifully handcrafted ball stud piercing made of lucinite and designed by Kiona the korgonne jeweler. The rare teal material, along with the embedded savicite gems, skyrockets its worth as a pure fashion accessory, thanks to the unique properties the lucinite metal. Together, the effects of the lucinite’s heat absorption and the psionic lust emissions from the savicite are virtually nullified, making this top-quality jewelry. A delicately inscribed ‘KK’ at the base of the piercing marks the signature of its expert maker.
context: <<POS:07430384>> e.tooltip='A beautifully handcrafted ball stud piercing made of lucinit'
